chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S-316 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. For Non-Prosecution. 08.07.2025 None present for applicant. ******** On the last date of hearing none was present on behalf of applicant and no intimation was received. The position remains unchanged today. Office objections to process copies has also not been complied. It appears that the applicant has lost interest. The lis is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
